title: Wałbrzych, Lower Silesian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Wałbrzych, Lower Silesian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Wałbrzych is a city in Lower Silesian with a population of 111,356. A city in the Sudetes mountains, known for the magnificent Książ Castle, one of the largest castles in Poland, and its mining heritage.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
